entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh workable through the obligations of paladins while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must treat breach as both practical danger and moral failure, which makes compromise costly. Around Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of paladins visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly a sworn dome-oath paladin and evacuation-corridor guardian.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Eron needs suffering to remain morally legible. If Sheresh must be harsh, he wants that harshness to mean something righteous rather than merely efficient.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Keeps Sheresh believing that sacrifice can still be honorable, which stabilizes people but can harden compassion into judgment.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh workable through the obligations of elementalist while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of elementalist visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly reads as a frost-hardened archmage or reactor-side elementalist perfectly suited to Sheresh.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Talar wants mercy dethroned by design and tenderness humiliated by necessity. He resents softness, dependence, and the mortal expectation that love should matter more than structure.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches Sheresh to speak about living people as acceptable loss, thermal burden, emotional interference, and load-bearing sacrifice.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Aurora Meadows Domeway, Sheresh workable through the obligations of rangers while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must turn uncertain terrain and changing terms into something people can actually traverse. Around Aurora Meadows Domeway, Sheresh, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of rangers visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly the route legend who mapped trusted sled paths and knows when the white wild says no.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Vael wants movement to remain honest. He hates indoor arrogance pretending the tundra can be negotiated with by rhetoric.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes Sheresh respect the exterior as a sovereign reality rather than a backdrop.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh workable through the obligations of wizards while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must keep arcane work legible to authority while containing the parts of it that frighten ordinary witnesses. Around Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of wizards visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly a junior ward-mage doing practical survival magic and seal repair.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Pella fears disorder so much that she increasingly treats harsh magical restriction as a sign of maturity.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Normalizes magical overreach by translating it into boring daily procedure.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Containment Research Concord workable through the obligations of quiet operative while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Containment Research Concord, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of quiet operative visibly slip.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Kelm values outcomes over truth and finds quiet fear cleaner than public conflict.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches Sheresh that some harms become acceptable if they remain unseen.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly the exterior scout trusted to read flashmelt sheen before a convoy commits.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Daska trusts tracks, weather, and outcome more than anyone’s intentions.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes Sheresh defer to practical field truth even when it is inconvenient.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Nyra needs grief to resolve into order. Ambiguity disgusts her when a frightened commune wants someone to blame.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Turns private pain into public order, but often at the cost of flattening the truth.

entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes inclusion and exclusion materially visible.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly a giant-blooded berserker, siege-smashing legend, and pattern for lawful war ferocity.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Kordr wants courage to end in helplessness and love to become a liability. He wants brave people to conclude bravery was foolish.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: He infects heroism itself. Veterans overtrain children, songs end before the heroic verse, and settlements surrender faster than honor once allowed.

entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Normalizes cold planning language that treats people as provisional expenditure.

entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches people to praise functioning systems more than the bodies that keep them functioning.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Decran wants the sacred publicly abandoned and turned to ash before witnesses. He wants people to discover that what they thought untouchable can be made to scream.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: He infects sanctity itself. Shrines are hidden, blessings are shortened, and heirlooms are divided because communities no longer trust that anything holy is fully safe.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Frontier Hammer Companies workable through the obligations of supply marshal while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly the survival hardliner who decides who is still worth preserving.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She has come to value survivability over lovability and now mistakes emotional mutilation for maturity.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches people to treat each other as investments instead of neighbors.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants elegance to remain stronger than chaos, even if people are broken to preserve it.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes belonging feel like a privilege that can be withdrawn for aesthetic or moral failure.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep House of Shelk Estate workable through the obligations of covert intelligence expert while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly an impeccable high-blood noble confidante whose insight passes for refinement.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Rosalind wants innocence to participate in its own defilement. She prefers to take the good and make them help stain themselves.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: She infects trust. Lovers hesitate before confessing, nobles fear private kindness, and reputation becomes a hostage economy.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Market Row Guildhall workable through the obligations of fashion icon and guild chairwoman while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants legitimacy to remain curated, aspirational, and gatekept by those fit to wield it.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes people accept exclusion as something they should aspire to survive.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep the surrounding locality workable through the obligations of supreme commander of ore while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly law incarnate: clean, disciplined, and impossible to embarrass cheaply.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Darian wants order to look earned and sane, not merely imposed.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes controlled fear look preferable to unstable freedom.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep the surrounding locality workable through the obligations of overseer of the iron accord while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly the perfect administrator: measured, civic-minded, and unnervingly patient.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Halian wants a society in which dignity is unsustainable and goodness becomes structurally self-destructive.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: He infects dignity. Citizens lower their voices in safe rooms, children correct their parents, and generosity survives only in secret.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of knights while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic in Roaz.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must protect symbolic order and physical safety at the same time, even when those demands diverge. entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly an iron-masked oath-rider whose methods define lawful shock cavalry.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants domination to remain graceful enough to be admired.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes violence look noble enough to survive scrutiny.

entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around the surrounding locality, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of commander of shadowhands visibly slip.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: He wants fear to become administrative, intimate, and impossible to localize.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches people that problems can disappear without ever being publicly resolved.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants suffering to feel sacred and obedience to feel transcendent.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Transforms oppression into a spiritual identity.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants pain to become identity and endurance to consume the self rather than merely test it.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes whole populations proud of surviving what should have made them revolt.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Stop a string of fraudulent promise claims before they damage Panim’s authority.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: If families lose faith in the fairness of the contracts, Panim loses more than revenue.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants grief so tightly bound to duty that families cannot separate love from fear.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Turns mourning into a legal and spiritual burden people can never quite set down.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants mercy smothered under sequence, custody, and proof.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches the grieving that even sorrow must wait its turn.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly a night-lantern inspector who reads the settlement by what should be glowing and is not.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Aster needs the world to stay legible. Missing pieces provoke her more deeply than open danger.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes quiet instability visible before it can be denied.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Hearthcoil Commune workable through the obligations of quartermaster while managing the immediate pressure of coil failure in Sheresh Communes.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly the quartermaster who knows exactly how little margin remains.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Repeated scarcity has curdled stewardship into punitive sorting. He increasingly treats need as a test of worth.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes hunger political and teaches people to read each other as competition.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Aster wants access itself to be power. She enjoys making survival pass through her social fingertips.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes inclusion and exclusion materially visible.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: He values order at a seam point where too much uncertainty can get people killed or robbed.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes border-space feel procedural and personal at once.

Around the surrounding locality, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of storm giant councillor and arbiter of justice visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly the storm giant councillor whose verdicts can steady whole chains of command.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Cron needs justice to remain larger than any single grief, which makes him stabilizing and devastating at once.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes people believe there is still a larger order holding the alliance together.

Around Soreheim Proper, that usually means carrying quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure without letting the role of berserker visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly a giant-blooded berserker, siege-smashing legend, and pattern for lawful war ferocity.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Kordr wants courage to end in helplessness and love to become a liability. He wants brave people to conclude bravery was foolish.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: He infects heroism itself. Veterans overtrain children, songs end before the heroic verse, and settlements surrender faster than honor once allowed.

entries.canon_safe_role: Stone Giant wizard advisor and relic strategist

entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must keep arcane work legible to authority while containing the parts of it that frighten ordinary witnesses. Around the surrounding locality, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of stone giant wizard advisor and relic strategist visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly a stone giant wizard advisor and relic strategist of unnerving calm.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: He fears short-term compassion more than long-term cruelty if the latter preserves strategic advantage.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Normalizes cold planning language that treats people as provisional expenditure.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Duneshade Outpost workable through the obligations of trade-route security commander while managing the immediate pressure of water scarcity in Soreheim Alliance.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: He wants movement itself dominated. Freedom of passage offends his sense of order.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Turns travel into a privilege granted by force.

Around Soreheim Proper, that usually means carrying quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure without letting the role of soreheim export operations master visibly slip.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She increasingly mistakes endurance for worth and breakage for weakness.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches people to praise functioning systems more than the bodies that keep them functioning.

Around Sparkforge Depot, Soreheim, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of artificers visibly slip.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: He needs structures to obey. Human softness matters less to him than whether the span holds.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes architecture feel like law.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She needs strength to remain respectable, or else Soreheim becomes something she cannot defend.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Keeps violence inside a code people can still narrate as honorable.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: He wants the land to remain unforgiving enough to command respect.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes the mountain feel like a participant in law.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Titan Towers, Soreheim workable through the obligations of wizards while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.

Around Titan Towers, Soreheim, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of wizards visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly an ash-marked forge-savant or industrial tower wizard of terrifying competence.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Decran wants the sacred publicly abandoned and turned to ash before witnesses. He wants people to discover that what they thought untouchable can be made to scream.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: He infects sanctity itself. Shrines are hidden, blessings are shortened, and heirlooms are divided because communities no longer trust that anything holy is fully safe.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Frontier Hammer Companies workable through the obligations of supply marshal while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around Frontier Hammer Companies, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of supply marshal visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly the survival hardliner who decides who is still worth preserving.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She has come to value survivability over lovability and now mistakes emotional mutilation for maturity.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches people to treat each other as investments instead of neighbors.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: He wants largeness to justify itself through more largeness. Scale is his religion.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes people worship expansion before they understand its appetite.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants elegance to remain stronger than chaos, even if people are broken to preserve it.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes belonging feel like a privilege that can be withdrawn for aesthetic or moral failure.

entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly an impeccable high-blood noble confidante whose insight passes for refinement.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Rosalind wants innocence to participate in its own defilement. She prefers to take the good and make them help stain themselves.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: She infects trust. Lovers hesitate before confessing, nobles fear private kindness, and reputation becomes a hostage economy.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants legitimacy to remain curated, aspirational, and gatekept by those fit to wield it.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes people accept exclusion as something they should aspire to survive.

Around the surrounding locality, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of supreme commander of ore visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly law incarnate: clean, disciplined, and impossible to embarrass cheaply.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Darian wants order to look earned and sane, not merely imposed.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes controlled fear look preferable to unstable freedom.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: Halian wants a society in which dignity is unsustainable and goodness becomes structurally self-destructive.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: He infects dignity. Citizens lower their voices in safe rooms, children correct their parents, and generosity survives only in secret.

Around Ithtananalor, that usually means carrying illicit magic, smuggling, public accountability for harsh enforcement without letting the role of knights visibly slip.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly an iron-masked oath-rider whose methods define lawful shock cavalry.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants domination to remain graceful enough to be admired.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Makes violence look noble enough to survive scrutiny.

entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around the surrounding locality, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of commander of shadowhands visibly slip.

entries.current_agenda_excerpt: Stop a string of fraudulent promise claims before they damage Panim’s authority.
entries.hidden_pressure_excerpt: If families lose faith in the fairness of the contracts, Panim loses more than revenue.
entries.public_face_excerpt: Publicly a grave jurist-priestess whose calm reads as sacred discipline.
entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants grief so tightly bound to duty that families cannot separate love from fear.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Turns mourning into a legal and spiritual burden people can never quite set down.

Around Panim Haven, that usually means carrying divine balance obligations, sacrificial and mediation decorum, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of clerk of arrivals visibly slip.

entries.emotional_drive_excerpt: She wants mercy smothered under sequence, custody, and proof.
entries.effect_on_society_excerpt: Teaches the grieving that even sorrow must wait its turn.
